compression.authority_ceiling: Public fixture and exported-bundle receipts only; no live Task Ledger mutation, live Work Ledger mutation, live git mutation, private backup execution, broad checkpoint authorization, release approval, publication approval, or whole-system correctness.
compression.card: Mission Transaction Work Spine is the public replay membrane for Microcosm work-landing discipline. It checks fixed WorkItem, claim, dependency, transaction, receipt-drain, closeout, scoped mutation, and checkpoint-lane rows; validates copied Task Ledger, Work Ledger, checkpoint, scoped-commit, and mission-preflight source modules by manifest; and writes body-free receipts with secret-exclusion and authority ceilings.
compression.one_line: The public mission-transaction fixture validates work-landing, claim, dependency, scoped-commit, checkpoint-lane, receipt-drain, closeout, and copied non-secret control source-module contracts without mutating live ledgers or git.
